tasks.label: Compilar y Correr OpenGL
tasks.command: $cmakePath = if (Test-Path 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe') { 'C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe' } elseif (Get-Command cmake -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { 'cmake' } else { Write-Error 'No se encontro cmake. Instala Visual Studio con C++ o CMake global.'; exit 1 }; & $cmakePath -A x64 -B build_win -S .; & $cmakePath --build build_win --config Release; if ($?) { .\build_win\Release\app.exe }
